title: BetterEnd - Farmer's Delight - Bark Cutting Compat
description: Adds Compatibility Between BetterEnd & Farmer's Delight
body:
Adds Support Between [BetterEnd](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend) & [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-fabric)

[CurseForge Version Here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/betterend-farmers-delight-bark-cutting-compat)

Normally, when you try to cut modded wood types with a cutting board, a message appears saying, 'Doesn't seem cuttable...' However, with this datapack, it simply cuts the wood and gives you bark!

Both Mods are Required!

- Log Types:

- Dragon Tree,

- Endlotus,

- Helix Tree,

- Jellyshroom,

- Lacugrove,

- Lucernia,

- Mossy Glowshroom,

- Pythadendron,

- Tenanea,

- Umbrella Tree.

All Types have,

- Door,

- Hanging Sign,

- Log,

- Sign,

- Trapdoor,

- And Wood Types!

# THIS IS A DATAPACK!

How to Download:

1. Download the file.

2. Add it to the datapacks folder or use a loader (links below).

3. Start your world.

Links:

- [Paxi](https://modrinth.com/mod/paxi)

- [Open Loader](https://modrinth.com/mod/open-loader)

- [Global Packs](https://modrinth.com/mod/globalpacks)

**How to use with Forge / Neoforge:**

1. Download the Forge Version of [Farmer's Delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-delight)

2. Download the Mod.

3. Download [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector), [Connector Extras](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector-extras) and [Forgified Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/forgified-fabric-api).

4. Then add the mod to your mods folder.

5. Then just launch the game!

Please Note that doing this can cause issues, crashes or other problems, if so please click this link to go to the [official github page.](https://github.com/Sinytra/Connector/issues)
